content_body: My family and I just spent a wonderful weekend at the Time Flies cabin. Our weekend could not have been better. The fully stocked kitchen made it easy for us to cook great meals everyday and we thoroughly enjoyed eating each meal outside on the covered deck, just feet from the river. In the evenings we roasted marshmellows in the fireplace on that same deck. A huge bonus was the music sound system wired through out the house and outside living area. We didn’t turn on the TV even once, we choose to spend all our time on the large covered deck listening to music, playing cards and board games, all of which were supplied by the cabin. We can’t wait to come back!
title: Could Not Have Been Better!
